items.name: Breakwater
items.description: Breakwater is a local on-call agent service. Its name comes from "breakwater": by leveraging large model capabilities and historical data, it blocks the majority of online issues at an early stage, allowing R&D to focus only on parts that require judgment.

items.name: Automated-CI-CD-and-Security-Compliance-Pipeline-for-Cloud-Applications
